narrative:
West Chester Twp 8 (precinct in Butler County) has 751 registered voters, with 53.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.4 percentage points.
